===[[Pokémon Masters EX]]===
<!--{{main|Jupiter (Masters)}}-->
Jupiter appears as an [[Non-player character|NPC]] in [[Pokémon Masters EX]] and forms a [[sync pair]] with {{p|Skuntank}}. She first appears in the [[villain event|villain event prelude]] [[Galactic Nightmare]]. She makes her most significant appearance in the {{DL|Villain arc|Sinnoh: Dreaming in Darkness|Sinnoh villain arc}} of the main story. She also makes a cameo in the [[story event]] [[Shine a Gentle Light]].

Jupiter, alongside [[Saturn]] and [[Mars]], can be battled in the [[extreme battle event]] {{DL|Extreme battle event|Team Galactic Takedown}}. All three commanders use {{p|Bronzong}} as their main battling Pokémon for this event.
